entry.title: Re: System Variables in SAC
entry.content: @vinayakgole We also have same requirement. Pls share solution if you achieved it.

entry.title: Re: Client has status not modifiable - SCC4
entry.content:
Hi Mani,

It is highly not recommended to directly change such things on Production system. I am not sure if you belong to Basis functional area or else it is more surprising that you have direct Client Administration rights. In urgent cases always Involve your Basis team and do it with Proper approvals, once the DEV and Quality is up and running, follow the defined Transport process again to make all the systems synchronized and for reporting purposes.

Note: If the defined TR processes are not followed then major issues can occur at the time of system Audit

Regards

Amit

entry.title: Re: Quick tip: how to add hdbsql to a $PATH on MacOS
entry.content: Thanks a lot, very helpful !

entry.title: Close Group Tree button is hidden in Crystal report viewer after upgrading to latest runtime
entry.content:
Hi,

After upgrading Crystal Report Runtime from SP35 to SP37, close group true button is not available in report viewer (ASP.NET). Please refer the below screenshots.

SP 35:

SP 37:

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: 1 job requisition for multiple identical positions
entry.content: Thank you Ernest, this is very much appreciated! I have my TA people analyze this and then we'll try to configure in our UAT system. I'll let you know the outcome. Best regards, Paul

entry.title: Re: QR Code in Smartforms not respecting the windows position
entry.content: You Have to set margin

entry.title: Re: Row Level Security in SAC
entry.content: We got this result before, but we have multiple stories and each story has multiple models, and this is a huge effort to give access for each model to users. Is there any way to group the users to give the access at once or to group the models? All we need is to simplify the process as much as possible

entry.title: Using a Single App Router for Multiple CAP Services
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I hope you are all doing well.

I am currently working on a project where I need to configure a single App Router to handle multiple CAP (Cloud Application Programming) services. While I have successfully managed to use a single App Router for multiple SAPUI5 front-end applications, I am struggling to extend this approach to multiple CAP services.

Despite my research and experimentation, I have not yet found a clear or effective way to achieve this. I would greatly appreciate any guidance, recommendations, or best practices you might have on this matter.

Has anyone here managed to configure an App Router to seamlessly route requests to different CAP services within the same deployment? If so, I would be grateful for any insights or examples you could share.

Many thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: Error message F5A 49 / Item xxx must be corrected in FB60
entry.content: Hi, i was getting the same error while doing fb60. sol - double click on "tds/tax payable gl" enter the text and save

entry.title: Some transactions in not assigned cost center
entry.content: There are transactions that are Not Assigned to a cost center, but I can't find them on transaction KSB1. Is there other ways to find those transactions on the system?

entry.title: Re: Set up your SAP S/4HANA system for EAM Inspection Checklists
entry.content:
Hi,

It was an excellent blog. I was able to set up successfully. But i have a question regarding inspection plan.

As per my understanding, we used inspection plan to assign the MICs and Classification. These activity can be done in general task list it self. What is the purpose of having inspection plan ? as this also requires to create material master.

 

Thanks,

 

Surya

entry.title: Re: Enabling Flex Time for Germany and Working Time Account cannot exceed 40hrs per month.
entry.content: Thank you!

entry.title: Action Required: Apple Push Notification Service Server Certificate Update
entry.content:
I received an email regarding the Apple APN's are changing and we need to download an RSA to upload to the server so that we can continue using push notifications in our Apple devices until 24th February 2025.

The problem is that I've checked the SAP Mobile Services configuration and I don't see any way of uploading this cert.

Does anyone know if SAP will support it automatically or how can I do this?

entry.title: Re: Future Dated Hires Provisioning from SF EC/Onboarding to Azure AD / Onprem AD
entry.content:
Hi @JPRAKASH 

following your blog we have maintained All(External Onboarding User) as target in RBP. However it still does not resolve our problem

In our case, the writeback from AD is supposed to update the Username and Email in SF . It works fine for employees created directly in EC, even when the employee is inactive and joining date is in future. However for inactive and future employees from Onboarding, does not get their username updated by writeback (the email id gets updated though) 

The error in writeback provisioning log is Failed to add/update user [Emp Id] "" (N/A;N/A;N/A): General Error with error code - -28. with the index 0.

entry.title: Re: Upload transport files from SAP
entry.content:
As a pre-requisites we need to configure the logical path under File transaction.
Else it will  not allow to download the files.

Thanks for providing details steps

entry.title: Re: Find materials with the status of "with replacement"...
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAP S/4HANA, you might find it beneficial to use specific reporting tools or create custom reports using the available tools provided by SAP. Since you want to identify materials flagged for replacement but without a determined substitute, here’s a general approach you might take:

1. **Use the Material Master:**
- The material master in SAP contains the data for materials, including substitution information. You could begin by extracting data from the material master where the substitution indicator is set.

2. **Create a Custom Report:**
- You could use SAP's reporting tools, such as SAP Query or, if more complex logic is required, ABAP programming to create a custom report. The report should pull from the material master table for entries where the indicator for replacement is set but the field for the substitute material is blank.

3. **Utilize SAP Analytics Cloud:**
- If available, SAP Analytics Cloud can be used to set up custom dashboards and reports that integrate data from different sources, potentially highlighting gaps in data, such as missing substitutions.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: AI-assisted process modeling: instantly transform text into BPMN diagrams
entry.content:
Transforming the future of business process management 

The landscape of process modeling is evolving rapidly. As the demand for documenting and analyzing business processes increases, process modelers face growing challenges in keeping up with the pace. Limited capacity, uncertainty on where to start, and the need for more efficient collaboration between process experts and BPMN specialists often slow down the process. 

What if you could begin with a draft and refine it instead of starting from scratch? What if business experts, rather than only BPMN specialists, could contribute directly to process models? These are the questions driving SAP Signavio’s upcoming innovation: AI-assisted process modeler, text to process (see availability and activation).  

Introducing AI-assisted process modeler, text to process in SAP Signavio 

As the first feature under our AI-assisted process modeler initiative, text to process enables process modelers and subject matter experts to significantly reduce the time required to create new processes. By simply providing a text prompt, AI automatically translates it into a well-structured BPMN diagram, which can then be further refined and customized. 

Check it out with this video.

How it works 

Imagine you have just concluded a workshop with colleagues, capturing key process steps in a whiteboarding tool, a PDF document, or a Word file. Instead of manually converting this information into a BPMN model, you can now input the text directly into SAP Signavio, and AI will generate an initial process model for you. If needed, you can regenerate the model from scratch or fine-tune the generated diagram. 

What makes a good prompt? 

To ensure the best possible BPMN diagram generation, a good prompt should follow these best practices:  

  • Define the process scope 
    • Clearly state the objective of the process. 
    • Identify start and end points, along with any key milestones.  
  • Structure the process logically  
    • Describe a Start Event to indicate where the process begins.  
    • Break the process into clear activities or tasks.  
    • Use a sequential order that mirrors real-world execution.  
  • Include decision points and conditions  
    • Specify conditions that determine different pathways.  
    • Define actions based on different outcomes (e.g., approval vs. rejection scenarios).  
  • Ensure accuracy and completeness  
    • Provide sufficient detail while avoiding unnecessary complexity.  
    • Make sure key actors, dependencies, and interactions are clearly stated 

Example of a good prompt: 

"The process starts when a payroll data alert is assigned. The agent assesses the alert. If no data change is needed, the agent comments and closes the alert. If a data change is required, the agent consults with the line manager, determines if an update is needed, and corrects the payroll data if necessary. If additional updates are required, the agent works with the system administrator to finalize changes before closing the alert." 

BPMN diagram output 

 

 Benefits 

Process modeling for an enterprise can cost hundreds of thousands of dollars annually, factoring in the time it takes to collect inputs, create or update hundreds of process models. By leveraging the AI-assisted process modeler, text to process capability, this amount can be reduced significantly while giving time back to then be used to customers advantage. 

Key benefits include: 

  • Faster time to value: Rapidly generate process models from text, reducing the time spent on manual diagram creation. 
  • Enhanced collaboration: Simplify complex process descriptions by turning them into visual models, improving cross-team communication. 
  • Flexible editing: Ensure continuous improvement of models with the ability to save and refine them in SAP Signavio Process Manager. 

Availability and activation 

The AI-assisted process modeler, text to process feature is planned to be generally available in March 2025 (subject to change). Reach out to your account executive or customer success partner for updates on release date and more information on how to access this capability. Also visit the roadmap explorer for further details.    

The future of AI in process modeling 

This is just the beginning of an exciting journey towards AI-driven process modeling. In the coming months, SAP Signavio will continue to introduce innovative AI-powered features, enhancing productivity and enabling more intuitive process management. 

Stay tuned for more updates and start transforming the way you model business processes with AI!

entry.title: Re: SAP BW to Google BigQuery using SAP Data Intelligence...
entry.content:
🔌& ▶️- BigQuery Toolkit for SAP is here, enabling seamless data replication from SAP ERP to BigQuery. 

  • Achieve real-time data replication by plugging the toolkit into SAP CDS (BW) Extractors.
  • Also allows programmatic extraction from anywhere in ABAP with just 2 statements.

entry.title: Re: Exporting Data to Google BigQuery
entry.content:
🔌& ▶️- BigQuery Toolkit for SAP is here, enabling seamless data replication from any SAP system to BigQuery. 

  • Achieve real-time data replication by plugging the toolkit into SAP CDS (BW) Extractors.
  • Also allows programmatic extraction from anywhere in ABAP with just 2 statements.

entry.title: Sales in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:
This blog shares highlights on Sales in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.

  • Managing Price Agreements In Sales Contracts
  • Creating Debit Memo Requests Through Spreadsheet Upload
  • Advanced Intercompany Sales: Basic Make-to-Order Process with Variant Configuration
  • Customer Returns for Material With Variant Configuration - Single Material
  • Customer Returns Product Valuation With Reference to Sales
  • SAP Fiori App “Manage Customer Returns (Version 2)”- Account Assignment, Returns Overview Log And Restart, And More
  • Enabling additional filters for partner roles and products in the SAP Fiori app “Manage Sales Orders – Version 2”
  • Sales Order Without Charge OData V4 API – Initial Scope
  • Ability To Read And Create Sales Orders With Variant Configuration Entities Supported In The OData V4 API
  • Sales Billing: OData V4 APIs
  • Sales order OData version 4 simulation API – initial scope

Watch my video to get a glimpse of the new features:

 

Managing Price Agreements In Sales Contracts

You can maintain condition records related to contracts, including scales, in a straightforward manner. Furthermore, you can perform partner authorization checks for release orders, based on customer hierarchy.

It enables you to create contract-specific condition records, allowing special prices for particular products to your end customers. 

In the SAP Fiori App Manage Sales Contract, you can manage the price agreements for the sold-to party. You can maintain all the contract-related condition records of price agreements, including scales. Moreover, when dealing with quantity and value contracts, the released sales orders can effectively use the referenced price agreements.

By automating the application of predefined price agreements during order creation, the need for manual input of special conditions is eliminated, reducing errors and improving efficiency in sales processing. Businesses gain customization and flexibility, as they can configure special price conditions such as discounts based on percentages, absolute values, or scalable amounts determined by purchase quantities, allowing for tailored pricing strategies that attract different customer segments and enhance competitiveness. This automation ensures consistent pricing across transactions, maintaining trust and satisfaction with customers. Additionally, the feature supports volume-based discounts, encouraging bulk purchases and potentially increasing sales volumes. With integration for hierarchical customer structures, there are authorization checks to ensure sales contracts and price agreements are applied only to intended partners according to company policy. The reduction in administrative overhead and the system managing price application frees up resources for other tasks. Configuration flexibility allows companies to adapt quickly to market changes by adjusting pricing strategies as needed, and access to detailed pricing scenarios enables better strategic decision-making. Overall, these benefits lead to improved operational efficiency, enhanced customer satisfaction, and potential increases in sales and profitability.

Watch this demo to have a complete view of the feature.

Demo: Application for Mass Updates of Service Contracts

 

Creating Debit Memo Requests Through Spreadsheet Upload

With our SAP Fiori app called "Import Debit Memo Requests," you can upload spreadsheets containing the required data to create debit memo requests.

You can view all imports regarding their overall processing status, import time, and the number of successful and failed creations.

This feature lets you create debit memo requests more efficiently through mass-upload capabilities. No more manual entries – simply upload your spreadsheet, and you're all set!

This feature aims to save you time and streamline the process. The introduction of a streamlined, bulk processing solution reduces the time and resources required for managing financial discrepancies or service modifications that necessitate debit memo requests. Organizations can now handle a high volume of transactions swiftly and error-free, ensuring better financial governance and responsiveness. This bolsters the company’s ability to address issues in billing quickly, maintaining robust cash flow management and client satisfaction.

Look at the following blog to have a detailed view on how to use the feature:

Import Credit Memo Requests – Introduction

Watch this demo to have a quick view of the feature.

Demo: Ability to Add Maintenance Plan Templates in Service Contracts

Advanced Intercompany Sales: Basic Make-to-Order Process with Variant Configuration

The advanced intercompany sales processing has been enhanced fo basic make-to-order (MTO) processing and advanced variant configuration (AVC).

In-scope features:

  • Enabling basic make-to-order (MTO) processing and advanced variant configuration (AVC) in advanced intercompany sales
    (new scope item 7DM based on scope item 5D2)
  • Enabling non-configurable item categories TAN and CBXN (free of charge) for MTO
  • Enabling configurable item categories
    • CBTC - Configuration at Material Level (fka TAC)
    • CBTN - Configuration at Material Level - Free of charge (100% Discount)
  • Support for the following requirement types:
    • BB6 - Costing permitted, but not required
    • S40 - Costing required, no consumption of PIR
    • S45 - Costing required, consume PIR w/o planning
    • S60 - Costing required, consume PIR planning material
    • KEK - Costing required, no consumption of PIR / Configuration mandatory
    • KEL - Costing required, no consumption of PIR / Configuration allowed
  • Valuated sales order stock without sales order controlling (no creation of CO object)
  • The variant configuration of the sales order of the selling company is referenced in all follow-up documents (e.g. for intercompany variant pricing)

In this document, you will see detailed steps on the complete use case. 

Advanced Intercompany Sales

Figure: Advanced Intercompany Sales

For more information, see Advanced Intercompany Sales: Basic Make-to-Order Process with Variant Configuration 

Customer Returns for Material With Variant Configuration - Single Material

This feature enables you to process the return of configurable materials that use advanced variant configuration (AVC) ordered by a customer.

 
The feature improves customer returns process efficiency for single material with variant configuration. It enhances the end-to-end user experience to handle single material with variant configuration.

You have enhanced process in customer returns with new scope item for material with variant configuration:

  • Returns order creation for configurable material with reference or without reference
  • Transfer of variant configuration from sales order to returns order and credit memo request further
  • Ability to get pricing and print-out document with variant configuration

These slides offer you detailed steps on the feature.

Presentation: EKT_Returns_for_Material_with_Variant_Configuration

 

Figure: Customer Returns for Material With Variant Configuration - Single Material

Watch this demo to have a quick view of the feature.

Demo: Customer Returns for Material With Variant Configuration - Single Material

For more information, see Customer Returns for Material with Variant Configuration

Customer Returns Product Valuation With Reference to Sales

This feature is elaborated in the following blog. 

BKP - Customer Returns Product Valuation with Reference to Sales

This feature enables you to valuate returned products by referencing the preceding sales process. Valuation takes place when the system posts a goods receipt into valuated stock or posts a goods movement for valuation. By default, the system uses the valuation price from the product master record to valuate products in customer returns. However, this default setting does not fit all returns scenarios. Sometimes, the valuation of the returned products must refer to the price used in the preceding sales process. This ensures that the resulting journal entries reflect the actual product value and cost reversal. To meet this requirement, you can now indicate in a returns order item that the valuation of the returned product in a customer return should refer to the preceding sales process. The system then uses the price from the preceding sales process to valuate the returned product, instead of the valuation price determined from the product master record at the time of the return. Valuating returned products based on the preceding sales process is a legal requirement in some countries and regions.

 
The feature provides more flexibility in customer returns for product valuation and sales cost reversal for finance integration You have more consistent product valuation and sales cost reversal in customer returns as in sales process.

Now you have new option to valuate returns product and reverse sales cost with new process variant “Valuate with Reference” in customer returns:

  • Configuration to activate customer returns product valuation with reference to sales
  • Process variant “Valuate with Reference” in application for selection
  • Returned product valuation and sales cost reversal with reference to sales during post goods receipt
  • Returned product valuation and sales cost reversal with reference to sales during material inspection confirmation

These slides offer you detailed steps on the feature.

Presentation: EKT_Product_Valuation_with_reference_to_Sales

Figure: Customer Returns Product Valuation With Reference to Sales

Watch this demo to have a quick view of the feature.

Demo: Customer Returns Product Valuation With Reference to Sales

For more information, see Help Document: Valuation with Reference to Sales

SAP Fiori App “Manage Customer Returns (Version 2)”- Account Assignment, Returns Overview Log And Restart, And More

The SAP Fiori app Manage Customer Returns Version 2 introduces several enhancements aimed at streamlining the customer returns process. One notable addition is the ability to manage account assignments directly within the item details of a customer return. This feature allows users to select a new field labeled 'Account Assignment' to facilitate precise tracking and allocation. Furthermore, the app enhances visibility by showcasing the application log, which details each phase of the returns process: from the acceptance of a returns order to the request for a credit memo and the initiation of a return delivery. This comprehensive log enables users to closely monitor the entire cycle, providing peace of mind that the process proceeds smoothly. In the event of an error, a convenient restart button is available, allowing users to regenerate documents and resume the process seamlessly. The enhanced returns overview offers improved processing status indicators, such as 'Not Started' and 'Completed Without Problem,' enabling users to quickly assess the status of their documents. If any errors are encountered, a simple click on the restart button ensures that the process continues to its conclusion without issues. Additionally, advanced data management features such as Profit Center, WBS Element, and Group Material are included for robust account assignments. These improvements exemplify small yet impactful enhancements to the customer returns experience.

By offering improved tracking and control throughout the return process, these enhancements empower businesses to handle returns with greater transparency and precision. The ability to monitor and restart processes ensures that any issues can be resolved quickly without significant customer dissatisfaction. Consequently, these enhancements lead to a streamlined returns management process that not only reduces operational headaches but also improves the overall customer experience, fostering loyalty and possibly recovering lost revenue through efficient service.

Watch this demo to have a complete view of the feature.

Demo: Change Process for Entire Service Contract Renewal

Enabling additional filters for partner roles and products in the SAP Fiori app “Manage Sales Orders – Version 2”

You can now filter the list of all sales orders by product. If at least one item contains the respective product, the sales order is shown in the list. You can now filter the list of all sales orders by the following partners: ship-to party, bill-to party, payer, employee responsible, and sales employee. You can also show these partners as columns in the table.

 
This feature helps you increase efficiency by searching for sales orders by specific business partners or products.
 
You can filter by the following partner roles: 

      - Ship to party 

      - Bill to party 

       - Payer 

       - Responsible employee 

       - Sales employee

Figure: Enabling additional filters for partner roles and products

Sales Order Without Charge OData V4 API – Initial Scope

A newly released API facilitates basic operations such as creating, updating, reading, and deleting sales orders without incurring charges, providing organizations with a simple yet essential tool for managing such orders.

API is now available for sales order without charge.

  • Improve holistic sales document management by enabling the integration of sales order without charge with external systems
  • Manage sales order without charge by using the sales order without charge OData V4 APIs in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • Require no additional effort to set up a communication arrangement for sales order without charge OData V4 APIs, as the sales order without charge OData V4 API is included directly in the existing communication arrangement
  • Provide the initial version of sales order without charge OData V4 API to create, update, read, and delete the sales order without charge and its entities, including:

       - Sales order without charge header

       - Sales order without charge item

       - Partner (sales order without charge header and item)

       - Text (sales order without charge header and item)

       - Schedule line

  • Use the sales order without charge OData V4 API together with existing sales order without charge APIs to fulfill different integration use cases to operate sales order without charge in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
​For more information, see Sales Order Without Charge (A2X)
 

Ability To Read And Create Sales Orders With Variant Configuration Entities Supported In The OData V4 API

Enhanced API capabilities now enable the handling of sales orders involving variant configurations, addressing a frequent need for tailored solutions amongst customers seeking products with specific configurations.

You can use API to read and create sales orders with variant configuration entities.

  • Improve holistic sales order management by enabling the integration of sales orders including variant configuration with external systems
  • Leverage the new features offered in the ABAP RESTful application programming model framework
  • Assure a future-ready and stable architecture that is consistent across objects with ABAP RESTful application programming model
  • Set up a communication arrangement for Sales Order OData v4 API without additional effort since it is directly included in the existing communication arrangement
  • In the modern A2X OData v4 Sales Order API, support for the creation of sales order items with variant configuration

For more information, see Sales Order (A2X)

 

Sales billing: OData v4 APIs

An expanded functional scope in the billing API includes capabilities for managing billing documents, requests, and even supports the addition of custom fields, enhancing document management flexibility.

Now we have more capabilities in APIs for sales billing.

  • Increase flexibility by managing billing documents, billing document requests, and preliminary billing documents using OData v4 APIs
  • Leverage the new features offered in ABAP RESTful application programming model
  • Use the latest features defined in the OData v4 protocol
  • Increased functional scope for OData v4 APIs in sales billing for managing billing documents, billing document requests, and preliminary billing documents:
  • Ability to add manual items to preliminary billing documents, as well as add, delete, and update texts in billing documents
  • Entities of header texts and item texts in billing documents
  • Custom field extensibility for billing document requests

For more information, see Billing Document, Billing Document Request, Preliminary Billing Document

Sales order OData version 4 simulation API – initial scope

With this API for sales orders, you can simulate the creation of sales orders in external systems. This API is based on the Open Data Protocol (OData) version 4 (V4) protocol. Compared to the Sales Order - Simulate (A2X, OData V2) API that has been available for several years, this API offers improved processing times and new features.

In comparison with the Sales Order - Simulate (A2X, OData V2) API, this API offers, for example, the following benefits:

  • You can choose whether you want to process your requests in a synchronous or asynchronous mode. For more information, see Asynchronous Processing.
  • It is based on the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model (in short RAP). This ensures a future-proof and stable architecture that is consistent across objects. You will find, for example, the same logic in the business object interface I_SALESORDERTP or in the Manage Sales Orders - Version 2 app.
  • It supports features that the Sales Order - Simulate (A2X, OData V2) cannot support for technical reasons. You can, for example, return the complete pricing details (including subtotals).

The API provides the initial version of the sales order OData v4 simulation API to simulate the sales orders, including the following:

  • Sales order header
  • Sales order item
  • Schedule line
  • Pricing elements (header and item)
  • Partner entities (header and item)

Note: The sales order OData version4 simulation API works together with existing sales order OData version 2 simulation API to fulfill different integration use cases to operate sales order simulation in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. In addition, if you've implemented the SD_SLS_CHECK_BEFORE_SAVE business add-in (BAdI) to check sales orders before you can save them, it is also called when you use this API.

  • Improve holistic sales order management by enabling the integration of sales orders with external systems for simulation use cases
  • Simulate sales orders by using the sales order OData version 4 simulation APIs in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
  • Leverage new features offered in the ABAP RESTful application programming model framework, for example:
    • Choose whether you want to process your requests in a synchronous or asynchronous mode
    • Gain support for features that the sales order – simulate (A2X, OData version 2) API cannot support for technical reasons, for example, returning complete price details (including subtotals)
    • Help ensure a future-proof and stable architecture that is consistent across objects

For more information, see Sales Order - Simulate (A2X), Help Document: Sales Order - Simulate (A2X, OData V4)

The enriched API functionality extends far beyond mere process facilitation. By providing powerful tools for application customization and integration, these APIs support faster adaptation to specific business needs and seamless integration with existing systems. This increased agility fosters innovation and competitive advantage, enabling companies to deliver differentiated offerings and integrate easily into broader IT ecosystems, thus maintaining business agility and competitiveness.

 

The Future of Business, Today: Get Your Access to AI-Assisted Features Thanks to this Limited Promotion Now! 

The 2502 update is a strategic investment that combines advanced AI with powerful enterprise management tools. Whether scaling your business, enhancing productivity, or building sustainable operations, its capabilities help support a more agile and resilient future.

Sign up for following features through the limited Promotion for AI-assisted Features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (for all countries, customers, and partners):

  • The easy filter and smart summarization features in SAP Fiori allow for efficient, natural language filtering of business data and seamless summarization capabilities, enabling users to quickly extract relevant information and jump-start subsequent collaboration. 
  • Facilitate easier understanding and interpretation of financial data with insights from cost center reviews and explanations of fixed-asset depreciation keys.

 

Discover the comprehensive learning resources for Service:
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and Service

The following Resource Map offers you a comprehensive collection of learning materials from business processes and Lines of Business (LoB).

Resource Map

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

  • Central Business Configuration
  • Extensibility
  • Two-Tier ERP
  • Automation Testing
  • Intelligent ERP
  • Master Data
  • Road to Success
  • Localization and Identity and Access Management

Recruit to Retire Human Resources

Idea to Market R&D and Engineering | Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management

Acquire to Decommission Asset Management

Source to Pay Sourcing and Procurement

Lead to Cash Sales | Solution Order Management | Service | Professional Services

Plan to Fulfill Manufacturing | Supply Chain

Finance | Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC), Trade, and Tax

 

📽️ Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series! 

Between January 21 and January 24, we conducted a series of 21 engaging live sessions to showcase the thrilling innovations included in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release. If you missed the live sessions, don't worry! You can still access the whole series or select the sessions that interest you the most. Seize this opportunity to watch them on demand at your convenience–anywhere, anytime.  

🔎Find All of Our Assets 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: Re: Access to application in S4 HANA Cloud missing even when business role is assigned to user
entry.content: I have this problem too.

entry.title: Re: Currency Conversion issue in SAC
entry.content:
I would suggest:

  1. Check uploaded value in local currency, if it's same as source in file. 
  2. Display data in table by Region and currency conversion measure, check if currency conversion works as expected
  3. check aggregation

entry.title: Re: EWM Layout-Oriented Storage Control (LOSC) – A simple guide
entry.content: Good work Yuri, thanks for sharing,

entry.title: Re: Account Information not recognized: Active Directory...
entry.content: This is not the case..we suspect some issue with kerberos authentication.

entry.title: Re: Unsupported OData version 4.01
entry.content:
Hi @UweFetzer_se38 ,

we will need to allow 4.01 metadata already for supporting scale="floating". We will not be able to support all 4.01 features at that time.

Best regards
Mathias.

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow: Custom Flexible Scenario - Part 4
entry.content: Kindly , How do i get the property name? I have done all the steps and consumed the service on the workflow the same way but it did not work

entry.title: Re: Row Level Security in SAC
entry.content: You can create teams for different groups of user, and share modeles and stories to teams

entry.title: Re: De-mystifying SAP Cloud Identity Services Integration with SAP Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Hello @florian_buech 

I have the following issue, we create the worzone portal standard edition and intially we didn't activate the "Identity Authentication".

After activate, we cannot login into the App, well we can login if we are using a user in Identity Cloud services, but the idea is login our corporative Idp. Our corporate IDP is setup as SAML, however we can see the Workzone app configured using OIDC on "applications Tab". How can i setup to login into our corporative idp? I've checked the previous link but there are not accessible anymore. ("migrate from OIDC to SAML")

Please let me know.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to Create Custom Workstreams and Deliverables in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: Hey, thanks for your great contribution! It really helped me a lot. However, I would like to know if I can also remove the old workstreams from the dropdown. If I add new ones but the old ones remain, the dropdown will become extremely long. Is there a way to remove the deleted workstreams from the dropdown?

entry.title: Re: Introduction to SAP S/4HANA Advanced Intercompany Sales
entry.content: For countries that need e-invoices to transit to government: how would you manage the incoming vendor invoice (B2B message) coming back from a government: cfr SDI in Italy, or Peppol, or other future site in France from 2026... The SAP note 3366067 explaining the restrictions for advanced intercompany sales explains that we cannot avoid the automatic intercompany supplier invoice even if the it has to come officially via a B2B message from tax authority. I think it makes sense to keep the sap automatic invoice (to use all available infos to generate the parallel valuation for group valuation needed for interco flow).but we should probably link into the official invoice coming back from Tax authorities: either via a transit account or whatever ==> shouldn't we improve our standard set-up to make it possible. This question is of course valid also for "old" classic interco vendor invoive generated with an idoc. I am looking forward to reading you.

entry.title: Re: Missing Delta - Enable Data Recovery in SAP BODS 4.2 with source as ODP/SLT tables
entry.content:
Hello,
I am trying this but in my current version 14.2.14 it doesn't work.

I have strange behaviours: with this SAP note the effect for me is:

- if I try to recover the last request following the note => no delta recovered (0 records).

- if I have more than 1 delta request and I try to recover the second-to-last one => the recovery is only for the last one.

- if I have 3 delta request => the recovery is for the last 3.

- if I did a recovery => the original records + the recovery is extracted...

in my case following the note became a useless mess

entry.title: Re: Microsoft Power Automate - SAP Business One
entry.content:

while searching for this solution, I came across your comment. You wrote that SAP has its own automation software. Could you please tell me what it is called? Thanks in advance.

Best regards

Tanzer

entry.title: Re: Unsupported evaluation Error
entry.content:
Hi Customer,

Hope you are doing well! From the Snapshot - I see you have used includes.

Kindly follow syntax as described in https://help.sap.com/docs/PRODUCT_ID/fsm_admin/advanced-settings.html?state=PRODUCTION&version=Cloud&locale=en-US#javascript-and-regex-in-screen-configurations & https://help.sap.com/docs/PRODUCT_ID/fsm_admin/advanced-settings.html?state=PRODUCTION&version=Cloud&locale=en-US#expression-examples

Hope this helps! 🙂

entry.title: Re: issue with fs10n after upgrade
entry.content: I tried this, but Field is not being displayed as an option in hidden fields panel

entry.title: Re: How to configure external number range for particular...
entry.content: Not possible even with user exit because you don't have external object field available in billing document types as like for sales orders

entry.title: While creating PR vendor material no. wrongly filling by Short text.
entry.content:
Hi,

while creating PR manually, Vendor Material No field is automatically getting filled by Short Text. instead of material number.

This issue is occurring only for specific plant and purchase organization.

what may be the issue? is it because of any kind of configuration issue, or there may be a previously done enhancement may affecting it?

1) If it may be configuration issue, please suggest me how can i identify that?

2) if it may be enhancement issue? please suggest me relevant BADI or enhancement spots.  

Thanks in advance.

Praveen

entry.title: Re: How to link a Storage bin / Material with a Storage L...
entry.content:
The way you describe it, I'm not sure I can apply it.

Let's take an example with a transfer that works with only 1 Storage Location.

I have a storage unit in Stor.Loc 1 in a Bin 1. To transfer it to Storage Type 2, I go to the LT10 transaction and specify my Material / Batch or the Storage Unit directly. Finally, in Specify Destination Data, I specify the Storage type and destination Bin and that's it.

Now that I don't have access to LQ01, how do I go about sending my Storage Unit to Storage Location 2 ?

Which transaction should I use?

entry.title: Crystal Report Viewer inside UpdatePanel displays only toolbar, report content missing
entry.content:
Hi,

Crystal Report Viewer does not display the report content when placed inside an UpdatePanel in ASP.NET Web Forms.

Please refer the below code.

<asp:ScriptManager ID="ScriptManager1" runat="server"></asp:ScriptManager>
<asp:UpdatePanel ID="UpdatePanel1" runat="server">
<ContentTemplate>
<div id="ReportViewerContainer" style="width: 100%; height: 95vh;">
<CR:CrystalReportViewer ID="CrystalReportViewer1" runat="server" AutoDataBind="true" HasRefreshButton="True" HasCrystalLogo="False" HasToggleParameterPanelButton="False" ToolPanelView="None" EnableDatabaseLogonPrompt="False" HasDrillUpButton="False" HasExportButton="False" HasPrintButton="False" BestFitPage="False" Width="100%" Height="100%" />
</div>
<asp:Button ID="ApplyFormula" runat="server" Text="Button" style="display:none" OnClick="ApplyFormula_Click" />
</ContentTemplate>
</asp:UpdatePanel>

If I move the div (ReportViewerContainer) and CRViewer outside UpdatePanel, report is displayed properly.

Can someone help me on this?

Thanks in advance!!

entry.title: Re: Where can I find free learning resources for ABAP Cloud back-end developers?
entry.content:
@Margit_Wagner 
Hello Margit, please could you guide me a bit ? I am following learning path Acquiring Core ABAP Skills. I settled BTP learning server, connect it with Eclipse and so on. Everything is working. But, when I want check the learning examples from the package /LRN/S4D400_EXERCISE I can not. This package is not available in this server. Do I have to set something ? Because I have got subscription for 6 attempts as you can see on the screenshot below. /DMO/Flight is there but the first one mentioned not. I am trying to follow up the learning path without that, but it is really annoying that i can not see the examples, which are mentioned in the learning guidelines.

entry.title: Re: Supplier invoice number range

entry.title: Re: LLM Fine-tuning
entry.content:
There were a couple of examples for fine tuning in the blog.  One of them was Building generative AI capabilities for ABAP. 

Do we also use fine tuning for Building generative AI capabilities for CAP ?

entry.title: Re: How to use ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud as a developer in an on-premise system
entry.content:
@OlgaDolinskaja Thanks Olga for your response.

Please find requested details:

1. How many custom objects in the system you check during such an ATC run?  Single INCLUDE also takes much time.
2. If you change a piece of code in a program for example: does the whole baseline get removed or just the findings related to this program appear again in the upcoming ATC run? Findings related to the program which were already baselined appear again.

Let me know if you need additional info.

Regards

Kavita

entry.title: Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I am running the boosters of sap build apps, and i am facing below mentioned error due to which i am unable to subscribe sap build apps.

I have tried subscribing the sap build app manually also, however it is also resulting in subscription failed in my trial account.

Please help in getting the solution for the same.

SAP Build SAP BTP cockpit

entry.title: Re: How to post tax relief in SAP Business ByDesign?
entry.content:
Hello Piotr,

Instead of making use of manual journal entries;

Try posting with the work center "Tax Management"> Manual Tax Entries. Input all necessary details and click "Post"

  • It is not advisable to make any entries to VAT accounts directly in the general ledger. These entries do not create entries in the tax register and are not entered in the tax subledger.

entry.title: Re: How to use ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud as a developer in an on-premise system
entry.content:
Hi @KavitaMane,

thank you for the details provided.

1. Regarding the performance issue with taking so much time also for a single INCLUDE I would recommend to open a ticket to SAP, this needs to be investigated in your environment

2. The baseline is effective as long as the related code sections remain unchanged: if the code is changed or a new code is added, the unique identifier for each ATC finding changes so that it does not match any more with the finding that has been added to the baseline. Therefore you get the findings again if you change source code of your program.

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: SAP DM - Consuming Materials From a Predefined Storage-Container
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently trying to design a process using standard SAP DM; however, I am facing some challenges regarding its proper implementation.

The process is as follows:

There are two operations in total, and the users involved in these operations do not communicate with one another.

In the first operation (let’s call it Operation 10), raw materials are loaded into a basket and packaged. Physically, there are five different baskets available, and the same baskets are repeatedly filled and emptied. Each package that is created, assigned a unique number and status (NEW, PREP, RDY, CMPL).

In the subsequent operation (Operation 20), only baskets with a status of “Ready” are displayed, and the user selects the basket they wish to consume. The moment the basket is selected, the materials within that package are recorded in the consumption table, thereby completing the process.

Possible Solution:
Define each basket (all five) as an MM storage location and execute the first operation via MM.
Then, on the DM screen for the second operation, create a button for each basket (MM storage). When the user clicks the button for the basket they want to use, the system will read the content of that MM storage via DM and, using a repeater, process the consumption of each material through DM.

Problem:
In later stages, if a confirmation cancellation occurs and the corresponding materials are returned to the MM storage, they may mix with the materials in the active basket. This mix-up would prevent the active process from progressing smoothly.

So, do you have any suggestion to handle this situation? I will be expecting hear from you as soon as possible

Regards
MSY

entry.title: Re: AI Assisted Skills Architecture Creation
entry.content:
@SharathSundar 

Hi Sharath,

  1. As Angela said, the link takes us to an SAP Sharepoint Login Page requesting information from the customer. I asked our CSM to place it in our dedicated Customer SAP Workzone and coud watch it from there.
  2. If the texts are inferred based on multiple combinations found in our Job Profiles and our Job Requisitions, how to you explain inferred skills that we know have nothing to do with our business. Below some examples of inferred skills that are not in our Job Profiles or in our Job Requisitions.
    • Electronic Dance Music (EDM)
    • Manutention et Port de Charges
    • Entretien et Nettoyage du Linge et des Vêtements
    • Julia
    • Fabrication

One of them is even in English. We do not maintain text in English. So, if English is not present, how can it infer an English skill in French?

Thank you,

Marcos

entry.title: Is it possible to include the attachments for invoices created through recurrence?
entry.content:
Hello,

Will the attachments uploaded to the recurrence invoice template be copied to the individual invoices when they are posted periodically? Can it do the same for a Journal entry recurrence as well? 

I'm using the apps "Manage Recurring Supplier Invoices" and "Manage Recurring Journal Entries" within  SAP S4hana public cloud.

Thank you in advance,

Regards,

Angeline

entry.title: Re: BAS - Load error in app using Attachment Services Reuse Component RAP V4 OData Service
entry.content: Hello, Did you found any resolution for this. I'm also facing the same issue just like yours

entry.title: SAP Crystal Reports randomly crashes on .Export call with access violation
entry.content: We have a VB.Net application that generates PDF files using the CR .export function. It can generate 100's of PDF files. It works fine on Windows 10 but when any of our developers move to Windows 11 the code will start to have random access violations on the .export call which cannot be handled with a Try/Catch. We have updated the Crystal runtime to the latest version (CR13SP37MSI64_0-80007712) but that does not correct the issue. Has anyone else had this issue and been able to resolve it?

entry.title: How to make a mdc table editable?
entry.content:
Hello everyone. I am currently trying out the mdc:Table and was wondering if there is an easy wat to implement editability like in this example for m:Table.
I thought about adding an "editMode" indicator that controls the delegator on what template to use (Input if editMode=true, Text if editMode=False). Now I only need to figure out how to send a "update the table" event.
Or is there a completely different way to do this?

entry.title: Re: SAP MM - What material features determine that I have...
entry.content:
I mean, what kind of changes, like for example: change of "material type" determines that i have to change the material ID. Or in other way - what can i change (based on SAP MM views: Base Data 1 etc..) can be changed and will not force a change to the Material ID.

Or should I be talking about revisions of a given material?

entry.title: Hello All,Can you suggest me the table where settlement condition contract condition values stored
entry.content:
We have a requirement to update only condition contract condition values in sales order manually through price change BAPI, because condition contract values got changed but we can't update new value through standard SAP update option in SO item level because conditions configured like that.

Now we are able to update new values manually in SO with the help of BAPI by uploading excel sheet but those manual value should be validate with condition contract condition values and then only it should update in sales order.

 For example: 

Condition contract new value: 0.06- USD per unit

Manual value: 0.08 USD per unit passed through BAPI to update in SO


So BAPI shouldn't update it because contract value not matching with manual value.

BR
Kasi

entry.title: Re: Populating Contract Dates in Sales Orders using userexit
entry.content:
I know it is very old question, but if you want to set initial values of the Contract Data tab (VEDA table) you can use this code in include MV45AFZZ, form USEREXIT_MOVE_FIELD_TO_VBAP:

  FIELD-SYMBOLS <xveda_tab> TYPE veda_t.

  CHECK vbap-matnr IS NOT INITIAL.

  ASSIGN ('(SAPLV45W)XVEDA[]') TO <xveda_tab>.
  CHECK         sy-subrc = 0
        AND NOT line_exists( <xveda_tab>[ vposn = vbap-posnr ] ).

  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO <xveda_tab> ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<xveda_itm>).

  <xveda_itm>-mandt        = sy-mandt.
  <xveda_itm>-vposn        = vbap-posnr.
  <xveda_itm>-updkz        = 'I'.

  <xveda_itm>-vbegdat      = sy-datum.
  <xveda_itm>-vbegdat+6(2) = '01'.

  CALL FUNCTION 'RP_CALC_DATE_IN_INTERVAL'
    EXPORTING date      = <xveda_itm>-vbegdat
              days      = 0
              months    = 6
              years     = 0
    IMPORTING calc_date = <xveda_itm>-venddat.

It sets contract period start and end dates for 6 months from the current month.

entry.title: Re: VA01 User Exit to set Contract Dates
entry.content:
I know it is very old question, but if you want to set initial values of the Contract Data tab (VEDA table) you can use this code in include MV45AFZZ, form USEREXIT_MOVE_FIELD_TO_VBAP:

 

  FIELD-SYMBOLS <xveda_tab> TYPE veda_t.

  CHECK vbap-matnr IS NOT INITIAL.

  ASSIGN ('(SAPLV45W)XVEDA[]') TO <xveda_tab>.
  CHECK         sy-subrc = 0
        AND NOT line_exists( <xveda_tab>[ vposn = vbap-posnr ] ).

  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO <xveda_tab> ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<xveda_itm>).

  <xveda_itm>-mandt        = sy-mandt.
  <xveda_itm>-vposn        = vbap-posnr.
  <xveda_itm>-updkz        = 'I'.

  <xveda_itm>-vbegdat      = sy-datum.
  <xveda_itm>-vbegdat+6(2) = '01'.

  CALL FUNCTION 'RP_CALC_DATE_IN_INTERVAL'
    EXPORTING date      = <xveda_itm>-vbegdat
              days      = 0
              months    = 6
              years     = 0
    IMPORTING calc_date = <xveda_itm>-venddat.

 

It sets contract period start and end dates for 6 months from the current month.

entry.title: Re: External number range for Billing Documents (VF01) possibility in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: Hello Experts, This requirement is for India country specific. I would really appreciate your advise. Thank you, kind regards Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: Handling of bank charges in bank statement
entry.content: Great article, as always! I am in the middle of implementing this for our CAMT.053V8 and just wanted to add that standard XSLT-Transformation from SAP (FIEB_CAMT053_V8_TO_FEB) does not properly map the charges, at least compared how they appear in our CAMT.053V8 files. So I created a Z_copy of that transformation and added custom logic; otherwise nothing is mapped to FEBEP-SPESK.

entry.title: strategy 81 with considering lot size restrictions/parameters
entry.content:
We would like to use strategy 81 (assemble to order with planned orders) and also take the lot sizes (max. lot size) into account.
Example: With a maximum lot size of 6 pieces, 2 planned orders should be created for a customer order of 8 pieces via assemble to order processing (planned orders). One for 6 pieces and one for 2 pieces.

We need it because we need the availability check for the components and also the capacity check. But we also need the system to consider the lot sizes from the material because of the restrictions on the production shopfloor.


Can the lot sizes from the material master be taken into account in assembly processing or not?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: Personas scripting overview
entry.content:
For the EWM standard transaction /SCWM/PACK we have business requirement to customize the SAP standard screen ‘Repack Product’ and add the 2 fields ‘Batch’ and ‘Barcode’.

Data for the field ‘Barcode’ will be supplied by scanning the barcode through RF gun and rest of the data in the screen including custom field ‘Batch’ should be populated by decoding the barcode string.

We need your suggestion for the feasibility of integration of RF gun with the SAP personas and further auto population of standard screen fields data along with custom field ‘Batch’ through barcode decoding.

can someone help me on this.

entry.title: Re: Certifications for Project Managers
entry.content:
Hi ekkert

The first certification uses only parts of the  "Discovering SAP Activate - Agile Project Delivery" as underlying content while the second is 100% based on it.

Thank you,

Omar

I remember that in NWBC, I had the ability to choose the change request type before proceeding. Why doesn’t the list of change request types pop up in Fiori?

entry.title: SAC - Block/overwrite old bookmarks
entry.content:
Hi community,

in one of our Input Templates, we have made some changes since the last planning cycle. We have added a source column, which leads to data beeing written on, lets say, "Manual Adjustment". In the old version, we didnt had that column, hence data was writte to source "Unassigned".

If users use their old bookmarks, they still see the old version of the input template and data is written on unassigned, which is a problem.

I could copy the Input Template and dont include the bookmarks, but the users wouldnt be amused about creating new bookmarks.

Is there a solution? For example keeping the selected Filters in the bookmark, but apply them to the new input template?

Do you need further explanation?

Kind regards,

Eric

entry.title: Re: Duplicate ID error while working with Adaptation project
entry.content: I have the same issue today. I am using form extensions with a oData v4 app. Within the app we use external navigation but on use of the back button to get back to my Object page I face this issue with the id of a field in my form extension fragment, It seems like a bug to me!

Hi,

We have the use case that we want to upload files from an SFTP server to the Datasphere every day. After the successful transfer, the files in the SFTP server directory should be deleted. Is there a solution for this?

Thanks

Raimund

entry.title: Re: EWM Layout-Oriented Storage Control (LOSC) – A simple guide
entry.content: Very helpfull @Yuri_Nogueira tks.

entry.title: Re: MDG Cloud ready Mode: Integration of S/4HANA with SAP Build process automation & SAP Build w
entry.content:
Hi,

I've performed all the steps but when trying starting the workflow we get the error "Destination 'BC_CPPA_INBOUND_DEST' is not valid for bgRFC" and the flow fails to start in step 1 (EDI).

After creating bgRFC inbound destination we get runtime error "BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT".

Have you encountered these issues as well during configuration and do you have an idea how to fix it?

Thanks in advance for any reply

entry.title: Re: How to link a Storage bin / Material with a Storage L...
entry.content:
Hi @BBQMaster68 

I'm assuming that the storage type 2 is assigned to storage location 2 in SPRO: Logistics Execution -> Warehouse Management -> Interfaces -> Inventory Management -> Define Storage Location Control -> Stor. Location Control in Warehouse Mgmt:

If so, the once you confirm a transfer order to storage type 2 of a stock that belongs to storage location 1, the system will recognize that the stock doesn't belong to the storage location assigned to the storage type 2, which is storage location 2. Thus, WM will automatically initiate MM stock transfer posting from storage location 1 to storage location 2, so you don't need to use any transaction here.

However, if you mark "Combine Post. Changes" checkbox, then the transfer posting to storage location 2 will not be triggered automatically. It needs to be triggered either manually with LQ01 or with a periodic background job with report RLLQ0100.

Again, that functionality doesn't work if storage type 2 is storage unit managed!

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Guide: Establishing On-Premise or Cloud SFTP Connectivity in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi,

We have the use case that we want to upload files from an SFTP server to the Datasphere every day. After the successful transfer, the files in the SFTP server directory should be deleted. Is there a solution for this?

Thanks

Raimund

entry.title: Re: getting errors user not allowed to backup encrypted d...

While migrating from SQL to HANA we are facing unhandled exception error. Screen shot FYR.

Kindly give the solution to solve the issue ASAP.

entry.title: Add user who last updated order
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to create a summary query of a collection of sales orders.

This data comes from the ORDR or RDR1 table.

I want to add which user last updated the sales order.

Can this be added?

entry.title: Is SAP Enable Now the best solution for SAP implementation partners?
entry.content:
Hello,

We, as SAP implementation partners are looking for an authoring solution to produce user guides, or small tutorials for our customers during the implementation of SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud, or other SAP products.

It seems that Enable Now is a powerful solution, but more for the customer side. We want to produce small personalized contents, for several customers. 

Is SAP enable now the best tool to create such contents? does SAP have a "smaller" tool just to produce tutorials and short user guides? We've been using the classical tools, like Microsoft Word or Powerpoint.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Cloud - Live data connection - No data sources
entry.content:
Hi former_member823622,

Pls try this once. 

Go to Settings in your browser, then click Cookies and site permissions, then click Manage and delete cookies site data and turn on the permission for Block third party cookies.

Now go to your server and on the right hand side of the URL area you will see an option for Third party cookies blocked, click on the icon (refer to highlighted icon in the screenshot below) and allow cookies.

This should work.

Thanks.

entry.title: DCI cannot be set for the item.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I am unable to tick the DCI.

The PO line item quantity and GR quantity are the same, and the invoice has also been processed for the same quantity.

In the header details, the PO quantity to be delivered is showing as zero.

Despite this, I am still encountering the error: "DCI cannot be set."

Could you please assist in resolving this issue?

RISE with SAP

entry.title: Re: Stop Rumours about Adobe LiveCycle Designer (ALD)

In case of any issues you must create a support ticket (BC_SRV_FP).

 

Regards,

Sandra

entry.title: Re: SAP Build App Integration Issue with BTP Destination
entry.content:
Destination Configuration:

Additional Properties:
- appgyver.Enabled
- HTML5.DynamicDestination
- MobileEnabled
- sap.applicationdevelopment.actions.enabled
- sap.build.usage
- sap.processautomation.enabled
- WebIDEEnabled
- WebIDEUsage

you need this service or from SAP maintsarvice 

thanks

entry.title: SAP Convergent Charging: Error invalidConfiguration (chargeableItemCheckCharge)
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are trying to call the service chargeableItemCheckCharge but we receive the following error "The mapping table "XXXX" is not found in the system" (it's a agreement table). Trying again after a few minutes, the service responds correctly. 

Could someone let us know what could be the reason?

Thanks and regards

Paolo

SAP Convergent Charging

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration - Getting the Error 'FAILED to start bundle from path:
entry.content: I think there is a general issue in the trial environment at the moment. I'm getting the same error when attempting to deploy.

entry.title: Generate Documentation in SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I created a simulation that includes a book page with text, followed by recorded snapshots.

It looks great in the Library, but when I generate the Hands-on Guide, the book page is moved into a table.

I need the book page to create a standalone page with text in the Hands-on Guide, not a table.

Is there a way to define this? 

I have reviewed the Resources > Documentation Settings area in Producer, but I haven't been able to succeed.

 

Could you help me please?

Thank you so much.

Heli

entry.title: Re: Set up your SAP S/4HANA system for EAM Inspection Checklists
entry.content:
Hi Surya,

WHY using a QM inspection plan instead of a PM maintenance task list with inspection characteristics?

The classic calibration solution with inspection lot origin=14 uses the same PM maintenance task list for 2 purposes:

  • Template for PM work order
  • Defining inspection characteristics

This does not allow flexible assignment of multiple inspection plans and inspection lots to one work order.

The design of the new solution is different and has other advantages, too. Please see SAP note 3421917 - Inspection checklists and calibration
Link: https://me.sap.com/notes/3421917/E

The classic calibration solution still works in S/4HANA but won't be supported in new APIs or user interfaces in the future.

Recommendation: In S/4HANA you should use the new inspection checklists with QM inspection plans.

Best Regards,

Uwe

entry.title: Re: Consuming data from an Analytical Model
entry.content:
Hi Tobias,
We have a requirement to take snapshots of the open orders (weekly) and report on it. The analytical model can only provide current order position and the snapshots will provide historical data for trend reporting. 

Thanks,
Hiri

entry.title: UI/Manage Template not showing fieldID on offer template for Custattachment
entry.content:
In my offer template, we have the Custattachment configured, but when I look in the UI to try and update the offer, I get a constant error because the fieldID isn't showing and isn't available from the dropdown list.  

Any ideas as to why because it's configured correctly, yet having it means we have to rely on partners to make changes because it drops it in Manage templates.

entry.title: Re: sap.m.PDFViewer Issue SAPUI5

entry.title: Displaying Line Items with Tax Amount Included
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I would like to know the available options for displaying line items with the tax amount included. Specifically, I want to see the tax amount wherever a tax code has been assigned.

Is this possible? If so, would the "Display Line Items in General Ledger" app be the correct tool for this purpose?

I have attached a screenshot for reference.

Thank you in advance for your insights!

entry.title: Security Vulnerabilities in Crystal report engine for eclipse SP31
entry.content:
Hello

Looks like there are some vulnerabilities in Crystal Report Runtime Engine For Eclipse SP31 in the xmlconnector.jar file:

bouncycastle: xmlconnector.jar/lib/bcprov-jdk18on-171.jar   
Vulnerabilties: https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/org.bouncycastle/bcprov-jdk18on
Remediation version: 1.8

Apache Santuario: lib/xmlconnector.jar/lib/xmlsec-2.2.3.jar
Vulnerabilties: https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/org.apache.santuario/xmlsec
Remediation version: 4.0.3

Is there any chance this can be added to the roadmap?

Thank you!

Apologies, these were the vulnerabilities for sp30, which have been addressed in SP31

entry.title: Regarding of Automatic payment
entry.content:
Dear All,

Sorry for the rudimentary question.

When processing payments in Manage Automatic Payments, I think that post journal entry as "payables /  suspense accountof bank ".

I think this is only journal entry that can post in Manage Automatic Payments.

So, When does the journal entry to reduce the bank account occur?

Please let me know what application you need to use and what process you need to use.

entry.title: Re: Coding block at reconciliation account
entry.content: Did anyone find a solution?

entry.title: Peppol provider confguration in SAP Business One
entry.content:
I am trying to understand the meaning of the various parameter settings in the "Processing Targets for Protocol" option of the "Peppol Configuration Section" of "Electronic Documents" in SAP Business One, see capture in attached.

My Peppol provider Bill-it has assigned an API key to my account that can be used for interfacing, but I don't know if that technique is supported by B1iWS and how and what needs to be entered where to make this work.

Does anyone have experience with similar providers, and if so, what info needs to be entered to get this to work?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Build App Integration Issue with BTP Destination
entry.content: So you can see the catalog of services -- is that not what you wanted? Can you show more of the URL?

entry.title: Partial Amount Write-off using BAPI's
entry.content:
Hi All

We are trying to a partial amount write-off in a custom application (to enable mass write-off's) by calling the BAPI - BAPI_CTRACDOCUMENT_WRITEOFF, but it is not supported

The configuration is there to support partial-writeoffs and we can do the partial write-off via the standard t-code FP04 succesfully.

Is there a way to do partial write-off using the standard BAPI's or FM's? We don't want to create a new document id.

Best Regards

Navneet

entry.title: Re: DCI cannot be set for the item.
entry.content: Have you checked the PO History tab ? Which movement type are showing there ?

entry.title: Re: Consuming data from an Analytical Model
entry.content: Could you not get this data from the view below the Analytic Model?

entry.title: Re: SAP BAS mta app local run with calls to SAP B1 db ret...
entry.content: We fine the answer with SAP, and allow some Ip to fix my issue, https://help.sap.com/docs/bas/sap-business-application-studio/sap-business-application-studio-availability

entry.title: 11 great Business AI prototypes at the Capgemini private Hack2Build!
entry.content:
Introduction

The Hack2Build initiative is traditionally a 7-day challenge for multiple partners to build working prototypes. At first each partner's submitted use case is evaluated for technical feasibility and customer relevance by SAP. Then SAP experts provide guidance and coaching to partners with accepted use cases. Finally partners are invited to demo their prototype to a panel of judges in a demo jam. 

Our partner Capgemini is obviously taking Business AI very seriously and approached us shortly after SAP Sapphire 2024 with 40+ Business AI use cases across SAP business portfolio, prepared by various teams around the world. A first review showed the potential so we jointly decided to kick off the Capgemini private Hack2Build: an initiative to help Capgemini develop Business AI solutions that are relevant, reliable, and responsible for the 10-15 most promising use cases.

About the Capgemini private Hack2Build Initiative

Capgemini used SAP AI Core along with SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) services, including SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine's Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG). These capabilities helped contextualize information with any of the available 23 Large Language Models (LLMs) to provide enterprise-grade responses. Capgemini teams also utilised existing business services to enhance their AI solutions.

The initiative ran from November 19-27, 2024 in an hybrid mode with a few teams working out of the SAPLabs France in Mougins with a few SAP experts together while other teams connected remotely from around the world with the entire SAP team.

The event concluded with a demo jam where Capgemini teams showcased their working prototypes that integrated SAP BTP and SAP AI Core services with both SAP and non-SAP data. The demo jam session produced a winner and two runners-up. This blog highlights the use cases developed by the 3 winning teams as well as the other 8 finalists.

 

Kitchen captAIn
GDPR CompliBuddy
Material Master Data Maintenance
Intelligent Capacity Scheduling
Accelerated GxP Compliance Documentation
Oil & Gas Exploration & Production Modelling,Planning
Emergency Response Simulator
SAP CX - Hyper personalization
GenAI-powered vendor invoice management
Augmented field worker
Intelligent Contract Management

Winning Solutions

The top 3 solutions selected by the panel of judges were:

🥇  Augmented Field Worker
🥈  Accelerated GxP Compliance
🥉  Intelligent Material Master Data Maintenance

 

🥇  Augmented Field Worker

The solution leverages Generative AI, SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP), and HANA Database with Vector Engine to automate Non-Conformity (NC) qualification and resolution. It empowers field engineers with a mobile app providing instant similarity analysis based on a picture from a suspected NC, voice-activated commands e.g. with access to necessary documentation to declare an NC, and real-time repair recommendations, streamlining workflows, reducing manual effort, and enabling faster, more accurate decision-making in challenging field environments.

 

🥈  Accelerated GxP Compliance

Accelerated Good Practices (GxP) Compliance Tool provides GenAI-powered pharma documentation capabilities by connecting with core SAP processes via APIs to extract key data points. GenAI drafts initial content based on pre-defined templates and automates data entry based on pharma guidelines and company baselines, ensuring compliance to regulatory bodies and GxP norms.

 

🥉  Intelligent Material Master Data Maintenance

Intelligent Material Master Data Maintenance is a RAG-based SAP solution that helps to reduce of manual workload and errors, supports faster onboarding of materials using AI, increases data accuracy and reduces risks and costs in the supply chain.

 

Finalists

Below a short description of the 8 finalist solutions in no particular order

Kitchen captAIn

Kitchen captAIn is an intelligent solution catering to grocery-based platforms. It provides grocery/product details to customers with specific recipe/menu ideas, highlights details like allergy ans calorie details based on preferences to ensure an optimal and personalized buying experience while maximizing grocery utilization and minimizing waste.

GenAI Hyper personalization

 GenAI Hyperonalization collects real-time clickstream data from website visitors, including country, locations, cart items, purchases, duration, etc. It utilizes the captured data to create dynamic user personas for each session. Business users can generate personalized content and images for the products and delivering instant, tailored content directly on the store front.

Intelligent Contract Management

Intelligent Contract Management provides GenAI-powered contract management capabilities. It connects SAP Ariba processes with APIs to extract key data point, create and review draft contracts with intelligent insights from Ariba and S4HANA, and augment Ariba's Clauses library with new clauses.

Smart Field Report

Smart Field Report addresses the challenges of manual, time-consuming reports generation in Oil & Gas upstream operations e.g. production, drilling, emissions, by automating data extraction, analysis, and reporting on SAP and non-SAP relevant data. It improves efficiency by eliminating human errors, provides accurate and consistent reports, and offers actionable insights for better decision-/recommendations-making. The solution also enables real-time operations, ensures compliance, and drives digital transformation, promoting smarter and data-driven operations.

 

Intelligent Capacity Scheduling

Intelligent Capacity Scheduling tackles production scheduling challenges by using Generative AI to create a dynamic and intelligent scheduling system. It enhances SAP current setup by making schedules more adaptive and data-driven.

 

Panel of Judges

We extend our sincere thanks to the judges who lent their expertise to this initiative. Senior leaders and experts from SAP Business AI, SAP BTP, and Partner Ecosystem Success carefully evaluated 6-minute pitches from participating teams. They assessed each solution’s potential to address real-world challenges using SAP Business AI and provided thoughtful feedback to help partners further refine their solutions in the next phase of Hack2Build.

Helen Kushakovska

SAPLabs Mougins Managing Director

Christian Koenig

Director - Business AI Partner Product Management

Gianluigi Bagnoli

Global VP, BTP Solution Architects, PES

Rudi Held

Vice-President, Global Head of SAP Co-Innovation Lab, PES

Special Thanks

We extend our appreciation to the SAP team members from SAP Business AI, BTP Architecture, Strategic Partner Enablement, and SAP Co-Innovation Lab, whose expertise guided partners to successfully develop their solutions during the Capgemini Private Hack2Build Business AI initiative. Special thanks as well to the entire SAPLabs France team in Mougins for hosting us in their nice facilities.

Way Forward

Hack2Build consists of two phases: the hack phase and the build phase. All finalist teams in this initiative continue working with SAP, maintaining momentum in this co-innovation journey. SAP engages with Capgemini to expand the business AI prototypes into comprehensive offerings for customers.

As of today 3 solutions already made it (below) and 6 are in the process:

Augmented field workerValidated Partner Use Case (VPUC)
Smart Field ReportValidated Partner Use Case (VPUC)
Kitchen captAIn

Validated Partner Use Case (VPUC)

Video

Please click on the VIDEO LINK  for a first impression how the initiative looked like.

 

SAP AI Core SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.content: Hello Lakshmi,

entry.title: Re: DCI cannot be set for the item.
entry.content: In PO history first Gr performed for 101 after that 102 for reversing and again 101

entry.content: hey, it's not reusable for odata 4 ?

entry.title: How to enable Scorm for Mobile SAP Successfactors App
entry.content: I have created a course on Scorm1.2 Its working fine on laptop & computer but I want to enable it to be able users to access on Mobile SAP Successfactors App

entry.title: Re: De-mystifying SAP Cloud Identity Services Integration with SAP Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Hi @javier_rp1 ,

what's not an issue is the mix of protocols, so OIDC between subaccount / Work Zone and Cloud Identity services, and then SAML between Cloud Identity services and corporate IdP.

Since you write "Workzone app configured using OIDC on "applications Tab"", do you mean you see Work Zone as application in the administration console of Cloud Identity services? That's the place where you need to set the desired corporate IdP (under "conditional authentication"), just like you probably already did for the "application" that represents the whole subaccount in Cloud Identity services. (Depending on the trust configuration towards the corporate IdP, you might also have to adjust the subject name identifier and attribute mappings.)

If this doesn't help yet, I suggest you open a support ticket to clarify what's wrong, and if it was a configuration issue somewhere, update this thread to share this learning with the community.

Kind regards

Heiko
